attr.title: Zenohell
attr.desc: Zenohell is a 90s inspired shoot-em'up (shmup) that is all about simple gameplay, just dodge, shoot, score, with vibrant pixel visuals and a kicking 28 track soundtrack, with lots of content to boot.
attr.inst: Buy the game on Steam and copy all game files into assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Buy the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/402030/Zenohell/) and copy all game files into `assets` folder.
